name: Bank of Salem
description_short: Full-service community bank founded in 1883, serving Salem and Dent County with personal, business, agriculture, and real estate lending plus deposit accounts.
description_long: Bank of Salem is one of the oldest banks in the Ozarks, established on October 10, 1883, with an initial authorized capital of $13,000. The bank has deep historical roots in Salem, Missouri, surviving the Great Depression without failure and remaining in continuous operation for 140 years. It is still owned and operated by descendants of the original bank organizers, maintaining a strong connection to the local community it serves. The bank offers a comprehensive range of financial services across multiple loan categories and deposit products. Personal loans are available for vehicle purchases, vacations, and recreational vehicles with pre-approval options. Real estate loans cover family homes, commercial property, and construction projects. Business loans support both operational costs and growth initiatives. Agriculture loans specifically serve Dent County's farming, ranching, and forestry operations. The bank also provides online and mobile banking platforms, including the Brella debit card app with fraud alerts and card controls. Bank of Salem differentiates itself through its century-plus local presence, community ownership structure, and specialized agriculture lending focused on the regional economy. The bank maintains physical locations including a full-service drive-in branch opened in 2009 at the intersection of Highways 19-32-72. It houses historical artifacts and maintains transparent officer and director listings, demonstrating institutional stability. As a community bank, Bank of Salem is best suited for customers seeking relationship-based banking with local decision-making and familiarity with regional financing needs. The bank's primary limitation is geographic—it serves Salem and Dent County specifically, making it inaccessible to customers outside this area. The website does not provide detailed information about interest rates, fees, minimum deposit requirements, or account terms, requiring direct contact for specific product pricing.
services: Personal loans for vehicles, vacations, and recreational vehicles
Real estate loans for homes, commercial property, and construction
Business loans for operational and growth financing
Agriculture loans for farms, ranches, and forestry
Brella debit card app with fraud alerts and card controls
pros: 140-year operating history with continuous ownership by descendants of original organizers, demonstrating stability
Specialized agriculture loans tailored to Dent County farming, ranching, and forestry operations
Full-service drive-in branch at Highways 19-32-72 intersection opened in 2009 for convenience
Mobile banking and Brella app with fraud alerts, balance monitoring, and card controls
Personal loan pre-approval available for major purchases
Local decision-making with accessible management—officers and directors listed publicly
cons: Geographic limitation: serves only Salem and Dent County, not accessible to broader customer base
Website lacks pricing information—interest rates, fees, and minimum requirements not disclosed online
Limited transparency on specific loan terms, APRs, and product details compared to larger regional banks
best_for: Salem and Dent County residents and business owners seeking relationship banking
Farmers, ranchers, and foresters needing agriculture-specific financing
Customers prioritizing local ownership and community-focused lending decisions
diagnosis: Bank of Salem is best for Salem and Dent County residents and business owners seeking community-focused banking with local decision-making, particularly farmers and ranchers needing agriculture financing. The main caveat is strict geographic limitation—the bank operates only in Salem and Dent County, and potential customers should contact the bank directly for specific rates, fees, and minimum requirements not published online.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
